directive_events.owner_directive: 1305 accept-closed: rewrite engine/runners/local.py TODO so it no longer defers work to a closed issue. 1342 reopen the issue; the TODO stays pointing at the now-live tracker.
directive_events.reason: Owner reviewed B1 stale-TODO findings: #1305 is correctly closed (accept current subprocess-cwd contract, remove the stale deferred-work TODO that pointed to the closed issue); #1342 was closed COMPLETED but its acceptance criteria are unmet (lazy import + TODO still present, cycle still real) so reopen it.

directive_events.owner_directive: A2: mark only (low risk, honest tracked comment, no real wiring). A1 + A3: fix as behavior-correction bugs, no ADR for #1517.
directive_events.reason: Owner set A1-A3 direction: A1 (run-identity / event-bus scoping) and A3 (runner process lifecycle) are real bugs to fix; A2 (ADR-022 resource dispatch) is mark-only — confirmed low risk now, just add an honest tracked note, no L1 wiring. #1517 is a behavior correction, NOT an ADR.

directive_events.owner_directive: Fix A1+A3+A2-mark in one PR. Defer #1532 entirely (desktop: parts 2/3 moot, part 1 minor). Closes #1517, #1596, #1542.
directive_events.reason: Finalized round-3 core-debt PR scope: A1 run-identity isolation (#1517,#1596) + A3 runner process lifecycle (#1542) + A2 mark-only. #1532 deferred (desktop makes its reconnect/detached-run parts moot; kept open as tracker).

directive_events.owner_directive: Evaluate ProcessMonitor; if dead code, delete it directly (in this round's scope).
directive_events.reason: Owner directive: within round-3 scope, evaluate ProcessMonitor and delete it if it is dead code. Evaluation confirms it is dead (never instantiated/started in production; exit detection fully covered by await communicate() + AppBlock FileWatcher; the sync spawn_block_process non-await path has no production callers either).

directive_events.owner_directive: Delete the whole dead PROCESS_EXITED chain, not just ProcessMonitor (cut B).
directive_events.reason: Owner chose cut B: delete the full dead PROCESS_EXITED chain (ProcessMonitor + PROCESS_EXITED constant + scheduler _on_process_exited handler/subscription + resources PROCESS_EXITED subscription). Owner accepted that this touches scheduler (overlaps A1) and one resources subscription (overlaps A2 mark-only).

directive_events.owner_directive: Proceed with full B; do not touch PROCESS_SPAWNED this round.
directive_events.reason: Owner confirmed full cut B. PROCESS_SPAWNED left untouched this round (separate finding).

directive_events.owner_directive: Do A4-1 (#1640 atomic composite write) and A4-3 (#1530 just stamp version numbers on lineage.db/checkpoint/wire format, nothing else). Defer #1639 and A5. Then submit the PR.
directive_events.reason: Owner extended round-3 scope to two core-storage debts: #1640 (atomic CompositeStore multi-slot write) and #1530 (version-stamp persisted formats only — lineage.db / checkpoint / wire format; NO migration logic, minimal). #1639 (wrap_as_dataobject) and all of A5 (import cycles / no_cycles) deferred.
